name: io.github.travisbergen2/rpcs1-agent-tuner
title: RPCS-1 Agent Tuner & Translator
description: Diagnose why your AI agent will fail before rollout AND translate ambiguous human input. Two capabilities in one MCP server: (1) recommend_agent_configuration tunes temperature, top_p, and strategy for your agent's environment. (2) interpret, normalize, and rewrite help LLMs understand what users actually mean using the HF-HATP v2.0 protocol.

tools.name: recommend_agent_configuration
tools.description: Diagnose why a deployed AI agent may fail. Takes environmental entropy, predictability, stakes, context horizon, and commitment style, then returns receiver profile values (TI, SG, FT, UE, AR), platform parameters (temperature, top_p, strategy), regime prediction, reasoning, and warnings.

tools.name: interpret
tools.description: Detect ambiguity in user messages using the RPCS-1 Signature Ambiguity Framework. Returns AR level (AR0-AR5), confidence, candidate interpretations with scores, clarifying questions, and suggested next step.

tools.name: normalize
tools.description: Clean up text with ellipses, fragments, and run-on thoughts into coherent prose. Returns the number of fragments detected and the joined version.

tools.name: rewrite
tools.description: Get rewrite instructions for adapting text to a specific style: technical, plain, socially_gentle, concise, detailed, or direct.
